issue_title: Namespaced modules aren't showing up properly
issue_body_preview:
Have a look at this screenshot: It is a public namespaced module that I published. After installation only the @iduuck was shown. It's normally `@iduuck/react-phone-input`.

![screen shot 2016-08-16 at 4 59 41 pm](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/325241/17703710/fc81aaf4-63d2-11e6-941b-622
test_description_zh: 在项目中安装一个带命名空间的 npm 模块（如 @scope/package-name），启动 webpack-dashboard，观察模块列表面板中该命名空间模块的显示名称。
expected_result_zh: 命名空间模块应完整显示其包名（如 @iduuck/react-phone-input），而不是只显示 scope 部分（如 @iduuck）。
